features: 🧽【DEEP CLEANSING】Compressed facial sponge can deep cleansing pores and gently exfoliates skin, which is disposable. You can used alongside your makeup remover and cleanser, apply them on your facial sponge, and then gently massage on your face to remove makeup, face mask, dirt and much more.

♻【SAFE MATERIAL】This compressed face sponges are made from natural sponge extracted from wood pulp, soft and comfortable to use, odorless and non-toxic, safe and gentle to your skin. Moreover, with strong water absorption make it fully soak the soap and water very easily, allows you to clean your face with peace of mind.

✅【EASY TO USE & STORAGE】Each sponge expands to 3.15"(8cm) dia and 0.3" thick when it is saturated. Makeup facial sponge easy to use soak it in water to get a round shape, please soak in water for several times or 5-8 seconds until it expands to full size before using.

🛩【PERFECT SIZE & TRAVEL ESSENTIALS】Each sponge is compressed into a thin disc for 0.04" in thickness. With its compact compressed size and lightweight feel, this entire pack is perfect to be taken on-the-go, whcih allows you to keep your skin smooth, healthy and cleansed even when away from home, these facial sponges are a travel must-have!

✌【WIDELY USED】Face cleansing sponges are perfectly for removing any artificial chemicals from the skin,as well as, dirt, oil, makeup, cleansing your face skin pores deeply that will leave your skin clean and fresh. Also applicable to liquid foundation and foundation cream,best gift choice to friends and families.
description: Product description Why Choose AUAUY Compression Sponge? 108pcs/60pcs/48pcs/20pcs, sufficient quantity to meet your different needs, the best facial supplies for beauty professionals. Unlike other sponges, those with chemical additives, are too soft to exfoliate effectively. AUAUY Facial Sponge is made of natural sponge extracted from wood pulp. Pure wood pulp - plant fiber, without adding any chemicals and odors, makes cleansing more at ease and at ease. Specification: Material: Wood pulp Style style 1: Multicolor - 48 × Long Compressed Sponge + 60 × Round Compressed Sponge style 2: Multicolor - 48 × Long Compressed Sponge style 3: Pink - 60 × Compression Sponge(75*75*5mm) style 4: Beige - 60 × Compression Sponge(75*75*5mm) style 5: Pink - 60 × Compression Sponge(75*75*8mm) style 6: Beige - 60 × Compression Sponge(75*75*8mm) style 7: Pink - 20 × Compression Sponge(75*75*8mm) style 8: Beige - 20 × Compression Sponge(75*75*8mm) What will you get Compression Sponge How to use: 1. Soak the sponge in water until it swells to full size 2. Wring the sponge dry before use to remove excess moisture 3. Apply facial cleanser to the sponge 4. Gently massage the face with a sponge in circular motions 5. After each use, rinse and squeeze out moisture 6. Air dry the sponge and store in a cool dry place If you have any questions about our products, please feel free to contact us. We will give you a satisfactory answer as soon as possible. Directions 1. Dip the sponge in water until it expands to its full size, 2. Squeeze out excess water, 3. Apply facial cleansers on the sponge, 4. Gently massage the face in circular motions, 5. Rinse and squeeze water after each use, and 6. Air dry the sponge and store it in a cool, dry place. Safety Warning Please allow the sponge to air dry after each use to avoid bacterial growth.
